case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. VERNITA WOOD et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WOOD, VERNITA DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-12-2009
DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOOD, VERNITA $2,163.91 PRINCIPAL, $542.46 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,942.37, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SNYDER, DAVID B. SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT WOOD, VERNITA
